manual_verification_required.step: Press `v` in `pgcenter top` against an instance with changing DB sizes / replication lag
manual_verification_required.expect: In the databases: and replication: rows, the Size values are right-aligned in fixed 8-col slots; trailing labels (per, growth/s, lag, slots/retain, archiving backlog) hold a steady horizontal position across ticks and when a value drops to n/a. Numbers/units unchanged; wal size intentionally unchanged.

verdict: automated gate GREEN; feature ready pending the manual [012] visual check
